category_sources: Official SHML site presents it as shell markup language for terminal styling.
source_facts.description says it is a style framework for the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official documentation site brands the project as SHML.
docs_sources: Official SHML site provides getting-started documentation.
source_facts.homepage points to the official SHML documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/odb/shml; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official SHML getting-started documentation shows shell/Bash usage and terminal color/style helpers.
